approaches.title: Naive Recursive Simulation
approaches.summary: Directly simulates each step recursively without optimization, leading to time limit exceeded.

approaches.title: Modulo-Based Optimization
approaches.summary: Reduces step count using modulo perimeter to avoid redundant full cycles, improving efficiency.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Added perimeter calculation and modulo reduction to prevent excessive recursion.
